name: Christmas Delight Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt marshmallows over hot water until very soft.
2. Grind Figs, Dates, Nuts, and Coconut. Chop and drain the Cherries.
3. Mix all ingredients together to form a dough.
4. Pat the mixture into a 1/2 inch thick layer on a baking sheet.
5. Cut into squares.
6. Roll each square in granulated sugar.
Source: Lillian Dake, Hinckley Grange, Medina County, OH
